response:
The purpose of the pavilion design was to be calm and quiet.  

Assumption is that the design aimed to create a serene environment. This intention was clear from the materials used and the layout chosen. The structure was meant to blend with nature rather than dominate it. The colors selected were soft and neutral to enhance the feeling of peace. The overall atmosphere was intended to be restful and inviting. There was no intention to create any form of tension or excitement.  

Time flies when having fun is a common saying that highlights how quickly moments pass when engaged in enjoyable activities.  

Time flies when having joy is a variation that shifts the focus from fun to a broader sense of happiness.  

The design was not just about aesthetics but also about functionality. Every element was carefully considered to ensure comfort and tranquility. The space was meant to be a place of reflection and relaxation.  

The pavilion was intended to be a sanctuary from the outside world. It was designed with the user's well-being in mind. The goal was to provide a peaceful retreat that could be used for various purposes.  

P.S. Time flies when having fun Time flies when having joy
